description: AI漫剧运镜与动作素材库，包含镜头运动、角色动作、景别选择、情绪匹配

fields.name: 运镜/动作名称
fields.speed: 运动速度（缓慢/中等/快速）

entries.name: 推进运镜（Dolly In）
entries.description: 镜头缓慢或快速向前推进，从全景推向角色或物体，增强代入感
entries.emotion_match: 紧张、聚焦、重要时刻、内心震撼
entries.speed: 可调节（慢推：沉思/快推：震惊）
entries.scene_type: 对话/关键时刻/情绪爆发
entries.prompt_template: camera slowly pushes in toward [subject], [speed] dolly in, intensifying [emotion] atmosphere, cinematic
examples: Camera slowly pushes in toward the protagonist's face, intensifying the moment of realization, cinematic
Quick dolly in on the villain's reveal, dramatic impact, handheld energy

entries.name: 拉远运镜（Dolly Out）
entries.description: 镜头从近景向后退，展现环境全貌，制造疏离感或结束感
entries.prompt_template: camera slowly pulls back from [subject], revealing [environment], [speed] dolly out, sense of [emotion], cinematic
examples: Camera slowly pulls back from the couple, revealing the vast sunset landscape, sense of farewell, cinematic
Dolly out from the battlefield aftermath, revealing the scale of destruction, somber mood, epic wide shot

entries.name: 摇镜（Pan）
entries.description: 镜头水平旋转，从左到右或从右到左，展示环境或追踪运动
entries.emotion_match: 展示环境、追踪动作、平稳叙事
entries.scene_type: 环境介绍/战斗追踪/人群
examples: Camera pans left across the ancient temple interior, revealing intricate carvings and candlelight, slow and deliberate
Fast pan right following the running character through the market crowd, dynamic action sequence

entries.name: 跟踪运镜（Tracking Shot）
entries.description: 镜头跟随角色移动，平行或前后跟随，创造沉浸感
entries.prompt_template: tracking shot following [subject] as they [action], [environment], smooth camera movement, cinematic
examples: Tracking shot following the warrior as she walks through the battlefield, side angle, steady camera, dramatic lighting
Rear tracking shot following the character running through the forest, dynamic, handheld feel

entries.name: 升降运镜（Crane Up/Down）
entries.description: 镜头垂直升降，从低到高或高到低，改变视角
entries.emotion_match: 权力变化、揭示真相、宏大感
entries.prompt_template: crane [up/down] from [start_position] to [end_position], revealing [scene], smooth vertical movement, cinematic
examples: Crane up from ground level to reveal the full scale of the ancient city, epic establishing shot
Crane down from bird's eye view to street level, focusing on the lone figure walking through the crowd

entries.name: 环绕运镜（Surround/Orbit）
entries.description: 镜头围绕角色或物体旋转，360度或半周环绕
entries.scene_type: 角色登场/重要物品/战斗高潮
entries.prompt_template: camera orbits around [subject], [speed] rotation, [angle] view, emphasizing [emotion], cinematic slow-motion
examples: Camera orbits around the hero as he draws his sword, slow-motion, dramatic lighting, epic reveal
360-degree orbit around the ancient artifact, mystical glow, reverent atmosphere

entries.name: 甩镜（Whip Pan）
entries.description: 快速旋转镜头从一个目标切换到另一个，产生速度感
entries.prompt_template: whip pan from [subject_a] to [subject_b], fast camera movement, dynamic transition, action energy
examples: Whip pan from the attacking enemy to the hero's counter-attack, fast action transition

entries.name: 景别 - 远景
entries.description: 极远距离拍摄，人物在画面中很小，强调环境和空间感

entries.name: 景别 - 全景
entries.description: 展示完整场景和角色全身，交代环境与位置关系

entries.name: 景别 - 中景
entries.description: 腰部以上取景，兼顾角色表情和动作，最常用景别

entries.name: 景别 - 近景/特写
entries.description: 面部或局部特写，强调情绪和细节
entries.scene_type: 情绪爆发/关键物品/反应镜头

entries.name: 景别 - 大特写
entries.description: 极度放大局部（眼睛/手指/物品细节），制造紧张感

entries.name: 角色动作 - 站立交谈
entries.description: 角色面对面站立交谈，自然姿态
entries.prompt_template: [character_a] standing facing [character_b], engaged in conversation, natural posture, [emotion] expression

entries.name: 角色动作 - 行走/奔跑
entries.description: 角色移动中，步伐/跑步姿态

entries.name: 角色动作 - 打斗
entries.prompt_template: [character] performing [martial_arts/sword_fight/punch], dynamic action pose, motion blur, impact, cinematic

entries.name: 角色动作 - 情绪表达
entries.description: 通过肢体语言表达情绪
